data.title: PagerDuty appoints Scott Aronson to board; effective Feb 9, 2026. Tejada praises his leadership experience.
data.description: In San Francisco today, PagerDuty, Inc. (NYSE:PD), a prominent player in digital operations management, revealed the selection of Scott Aronson to their Board of Directors, starting from February 9, 2026. Jennifer Tejada, the Chairperson and CEO at PagerDuty, expressed excitement about this addition citing Aronson's impressive history in enterprise, go-to-market, and operations leadership. Tejada highlighted Aronson's success in expanding global operations, drawing on his accomplishments at companies such as Cloudera.

data.title: Champion Homes (NYSE: SKY) to announce third quarter 2026 earnings on Feb 3, 2026, with a conference call on Feb 4 at 8:00 A.M. ET.
data.description: TROY, Mich.-- Champion Homes, Inc. will announce its third-quarter fiscal year 2026 earnings after market closing on Tuesday, February 3, 2026. The company, listed as NYSE: SKY, has scheduled a conference call for the next day, Wednesday, February 4, 2026, at 8:00 A.M. Eastern Time to discuss the results. Investors and interested parties can access a live webcast of the call by visiting the Investor Relations section on the company's website.

data.title: Milan Kovac, ex-Tesla VP, joins DoorDash Board of Directors, effective Jan 16, 2026, company announced.
data.description: In San Francisco, DoorDash, Inc. (NASDAQ: DASH) has confirmed the appointment of Milan Kovac to its Board of Directors, starting January 16, 2026. Milan, who served as the Vice President of Optimus Robotics and Autopilot at Tesla previously, joins the board with a strong background in developing and expanding engineering initiatives focusing on AI, autonomy, and robotics. CEO Tony Xu praised Milan for his expertise in these areas, emphasizing his unique blend of technical proficiency and operational experience, making him a valuable addition to the team.

data.title: TWO schedules earnings release and conference call for Q4 2025 financial results. #TWO
data.description: In New York, TWO recently declared that they will release their financial results for the fourth quarter of 2025. The company is set to host a conference call regarding these results. Stay tuned for more updates on this important announcement in the financial sector.

data.title: ServiceNow boosts Partner Program to speed up AI agent innovation globally. (Character count: 74)
data.description: In Las Vegas, ServiceNow has unveiled major improvements to its worldwide Partner Program in a bid to drive rapid advancement in AI agent technology.

data.title: U.S. AI Advisor highlights UAE and G42 as critical partners for U.S. AI competitiveness at Davos, mentioning a 5GW UAE-US AI Campus.
data.description: Progress continues to gather pace for the AI collaboration, with a strong push towards the UAE-US AI Campus and chip approvals, highlighted last year with a 5GW capacity. Key figures convened in Davos for discussions, including G42 Group CEO Peng, during the World Economic Forum Annual Meeting. The partnership is evolving significantly with momentum, as highlighted during the recent meet-up in Switzerland on Jan. 20, 2026.

data.title: MJLF & Associates appoints Alexander Tuff to their board, boosting growth.
data.description: Norwalk, CT - MJLF & Associates has named Alexander Tuff to their Board of Directors, a move intended to drive the company's growth to the next level. The appointment signifies a strategic step forward as MJLF & Associates aims to expand its operations and reach new milestones.

data.title: Bitcoin and Solana prices drop below key support levels after losing "golden cross". Traders bearish as sentiment shifts.
data.description: Both Bitcoin and Solana have experienced a significant drop as they lost what traders refer to as a "golden cross." This decline has resonated strongly, leading to prediction market traders adjusting their positions as bullish sentiment diminishes rapidly.

data.title: United Airlines beats Q4 estimates with $15.397B revenue, $3.10 EPS, exceeding $15.396B expectation, shares rise after hours.
data.description: United Airlines Holdings Inc released their fourth-quarter financial results after the market closed on Tuesday. The company reported a revenue of $15.397 billion, surpassing the estimated $15.396 billion. Their adjusted earnings for the quarter were $3.10 per share, exceeding analyst predictions of $2.94 per share. Key highlights include a 9% increase in premium cabin revenue, a 7% increase in basic economy revenue, and a 10% rise in loyalty revenue. Despite these positive figures, United Airlines Holdings stock is facing a decline, with analysts suggesting various factors responsible for the drop. Further details are available on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Pentair (NYSE:PNR) to report Q4 and full-year 2025 earnings on February 3 and host investor call at 9:00 am EST.
data.description: London-based Pentair plc (NYSE:PNR), a global leader in water solutions, is set to announce its Q4 and full year 2025 financial results prior to the opening of the New York Stock Exchange on February 3, 2026. Alongside this, the company will conduct an investor conference call at 9:00 a.m. EST on the same day. Interested parties can access presentation materials on the firm's website under the "Investor Relations" section.

data.title: Kayne Anderson Energy Infrastructure Fund disclosed tax categorization of its 2025 distributions in Houston.
data.description: On January 20, 2026, in Houston, the Kayne Anderson Energy Infrastructure Fund, Inc. disclosed the tax treatment for the distributions made in 2025.

data.title: Clearmind Medicine Inc. files Annual Report on Form 20-F for fiscal year ending Oct 31, 2025 with the SEC.
data.description: In Vancouver, Canada on January 20, 2026, Clearmind Medicine Inc. (Nasdaq: CMND), (FSE: CWY0) revealed the submission of its Annual Report on Form 20-F for the fiscal year concluding on October 31, 2025, to the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission ('SEC'). The Company, a clinical-stage biotech entity concentrating on pioneering neuroplastogen-based therapeutics for significant undertreated health issues, made this announcement.

data.title: OGE Energy Corp. to hold Q4 2025 earnings webcast on Feb 18 at 9am ET. (NYSE: OGE)
data.description: OGE Energy Corp. (NYSE: OGE) has announced that they will be hosting a quarterly earnings and business update conference call on Wednesday, February 18, 2026, at 9 a.m. ET (8 a.m. CT). The call will be webcasted by Notified and will provide insights into the company's financial performance and strategic developments. This is an important event for investors and stakeholders interested in OGE Energy Corp.'s performance and future outlook.

data.title: OnePay to launch Swipe to Finance allowing customers to pay over time post-checkout in app. Jan. 20, 2026.
data.description: In the near future, Swipe to Finance is set to be introduced, allowing consumers to make post-checkout payments over time through the OnePay app. OnePay, a popular consumer fintech company, is planning to launch this service in the upcoming months. This innovative feature aims to provide greater flexibility for customers, enabling them to manage their payments conveniently. The announcement was made on January 20, 2026 in New York. This new payment option is anticipated to benefit the millions of users who rely on OnePay for their financial transactions.

data.title: Alfonso Costa Jr. appointed to Greystone AF Manager LLC Board of Managers as director on January 15, 2026.
data.description: In Omaha, Nebraska, on January 20, 2026, Greystone Housing Impact Investors LP (NYSE: GHI) shared that Alfonso Costa Jr. has been appointed to the Board of Managers of Greystone AF Manager LLC, the general partner of the Partnership. This appointment, effective from January 15, 2026, signifies Mr. Costa's role as a director of the Partnership moving forward.

data.title: Genco Shipping & Trading Limited to hold Q4 2025 conference call on Feb 18, 2026 at 8:30 a.m. Eastern Time. Financial results out on Feb 17 after market close.
data.description: On January 20, 2026, Genco Shipping & Trading Limited (NYSE: GNK) revealed its plans to conduct a conference call addressing the company's performance in the fourth quarter of 2025. This event is scheduled to take place on February 18, 2026, at 8:30 a.m. Eastern Time. Alongside the call, there will be a live internet broadcast featuring a slide presentation. The financial results for the fourth quarter, concluding on December 31, 2025, will be disclosed on February 17, 2026, following the closure of market trading.

data.title: Altai Resources Inc. (TSXV: ATI) reports shareholder meeting results with all matters approved by over 99% vote.
data.description: In Toronto on January 20, 2026, Altai Resources Inc. (TSXV: ATI) disclosed the successful outcomes of its annual and special shareholder meeting. The approval rates for all agenda items surpassed 99%, reflecting strong shareholder support.

data.title: Kite Realty Group provides tax info for 2025 dividends on common stock for Form 1099-DIV.
data.description: On January 20th, 2026, Kite Realty Group (NYSE: KRG) disclosed the allocations of its 2025 dividend distributions for its common stock. The breakdown, to be stated on Form 1099-DIV, includes specific figures for the allocations.
